name: La China ATX authentic Mexican food
address: 7609 Colton-Bluff Springs Rd, Austin, TX 78744, USA
review_1_text: Enjoyed their breakfast tacos. The chorizo with potato taco was delicious! Will be my new to go place for breakfast tacos.
review_2_text: A delicious oasis in a food desert! Great, friendly service and super tasty tacos (carnitas & fajitas this time) really made my afternoon. The homemade hot sauces really topped things off!
review_3_text: This place was amazing.. I had two tacos - tasty and authentic. The lady at the window was friendly and helpful as well. Definitely a highlight of my trip to Austin for authentic Mexican food.
review_4_text: House made tortillas are one of the best I've ever had. Pastor with pineapple is a great match. Bistek and pastor are popular so it may run out by 1pm after the lunch rush. The lady at the window is super friendly. 10/10 will come again.
review_5_text: So glad we found this hidden gem! We love this place! My go to is al pastor tacos or torta...Always delicious !
editorial_summary: Homemade corn and flour tortillas provide the base for classic Mexican favorites such as tacos and tortas.
